'''Doornik-319''' (also '''Morning Bell''',<ref name="Shield of Lies">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref> '''Morning's Bell'''<ref name="Before the Storm">''[[Before the Storm]]''</ref> and '''Preza'''<ref name="Shield of Lies" />) was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Doornik-319 system]].<ref name="Shield of Lies" /> The planet was known to the [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] as Morning's Bell<ref name="Before the Storm" /> and to the [[Yevetha]] as Preza.<ref name="Shield of Lies" /> Originally a Kubaz colony world, it was taken over by the Yevetha during the [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]], during which the Yevetha wiped out the Kubaz colonists.<ref name="Before the Storm" />

{{Planet-stub}}
